title: WRK-002: Verify mac-workstation profile end-to-end on Mac
description: Run `just setup profile=mac-workstation` from updated checkout. brew installs all deps; AeroSpace + SketchyBar configured. Cross-OS guard: `just plan profile=linux-workstation` exits 1 with the 'not valid for OS Darwin' message. Mark done once complete.

title: WRK-002: Verify linux-workstation profile end-to-end on Fedora
description: Run `just setup profile=linux-workstation` from updated checkout. Full GUI install + setup-sway-session runs. `just reload` works post-stow. Banner reads 'Setup: profile=linux-workstation (resolved from arg)'. Mark this task done once complete.

title: AeroSpace: scratchpad workspaces for Obsidian vaults
WRK-002: Verify linux-remote profile on Ona Ubuntu
description: From a fresh clone on Ona: `./bootstrap.sh` runs end-to-end. Banner reads 'Setup: profile=linux-remote (resolved from $DOTFILES_PROFILE)'. CLI deps install via apt; no GRUB/NVIDIA/flatpak/sway. Second `./bootstrap.sh` is idempotent (no errors, no duplicate symlinks). `zsh -i -c 'echo OK'` exits 0; nvim/tmux/zellij/git on PATH. Without `just`: `./bootstrap.sh` exits 1 with the install-hint URL. Mark done once complete.
blocked_reason: Blocked on human Ona testing after zsh-default remote shell changes

title: Remove tmux package — fully migrated to zellij
